There are few who rise above all the temptations of mortal life, because the body is more important than clothing, and health is more important than money, dignity, and respect.
lebanon.originalHeadline: كارلوس أبو نجم: ” بين عقدة الالقاب والشعب الساكن في الظلمة “

lebanon.headline: With Yendy...children's birthday becomes a wonderful and unforgettable adventure!
lebanon.description: In a world where children are increasingly interested in screens, Yendy stands out as a true space of joy that brings back the pulse of theater and its magic to childhood. With her lovable personality and humanitarian message, Yendy has been able to reserve her place in the hearts of children and parents alike, presenting shows that combine entertainment, interaction, and positive values. Under the management of Jean Charbel,

lebanon.headline: Scientists are confused... Have aliens arrived on Earth? What is the secret of the vehicle (I3/ATLAS)?
lebanon.description: London: Al Arabiya.net Confusing questions continue to dominate scientists after the pace of doubts has recently escalated regarding an “alien invasion” of the Earth. These doubts have led to one of the most prominent scientists setting an exact date for the arrival of alien beings to our planet, a date that was scheduled last month, while no one has been certain.

lebanon.headline: Two buildings in Bakhoun at risk of collapse were evacuated
lebanon.description: Police officers from the municipality of Bakhoun - Al-Dinniyeh evacuated two buildings of their residents in the Al-Shorfa area in the town, each containing 10 floors, with the support of members of the Internal Security Forces, and under the direction of the mayor, Abdul Razzaq Al-Ghoul. They were prevented from being occupied by anyone, after an inspection conducted by engineer Haitham Bassam Al-Samad at the request of the municipality, accompanied by a police officer.

secondary.headline: After most people shared their ideas and problems with artificial intelligence... Trainer Eman Ghanem sounds the alarm!
secondary.description: In an age where technology is intertwined with every detail of our lives, and where artificial intelligence and social media have become an essential part of our daily lives, the need to understand the impact of these tools on our awareness and behavior is increasing. secondary.headline: Urgent statement issued by the Hospital Syndicate in Lebanon
secondary.description: On February 1, 2026, in light of the threats that targeted Salah Ghandour Hospital in the south today via leaflets, the Hospital Syndicate in Lebanon announces its strong denunciation of any attack targeting any hospital, considering it a flagrant violation of international law and all recognized conventions. It calls on the international community and all humanitarian organizations to take action and protect the health sector
